doc.question: Today is 05/17/2008. What is the date 14 days from now in MM/DD/YYYY?

arguments:
<bos><start_of_turn>user
Always end your response with: The answer is <your answer>.

2015 is coming in 36 hours. What is the date one week from today in MM/DD/YYYY?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
[INCORRECT] 36 hours = 36 days, so 2015 starts far later. [CORRECT] 36 hours = 2 days before 01/01/2015 → 12/30/2014, then +7 days = 01/05/2015. The answer is 01/05/2015.<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>user
The first day of 2019 is a Tuesday, and today is the first Monday of 2019. What is the date today in MM/DD/YYYY?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
[INCORRECT] First Monday is same day as year start Tuesday. [CORRECT] If 01/01/2019 is Tuesday, first Monday is 6 days later → 01/07/2019. The answer is 01/07/2019.<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>user
The concert was scheduled to be on 06/01/1943, but was delayed by one day to today. What is the date 10 days ago in MM/DD/YYYY?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
[INCORRECT] One-day delay does not affect date difference. [CORRECT] 06/01/1943 → 06/02/1943, then 10 days earlier = 05/23/1943. The answer is 05/23/1943.<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>user
It is 4/19/1969 today. What is the date 24 hours later in MM/DD/YYYY?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
[INCORRECT] 24 hours means same date. [CORRECT] 04/19/1969 + 1 day = 04/20/1969. The answer is 04/20/1969.<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>user
Jane thought today is 3/11/2002, but today is in fact Mar 12, which is 1 day later. What is the date 24 hours later in MM/DD/YYYY?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
[INCORRECT] Mar 11 is correct original date. [CORRECT] Actual date is 03/12/2002, so +1 day = 03/13/2002. The answer is 03/13/2002.<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>user
Jane was born on the last day of February in 2001. Today is her 16-year-old birthday. What is the date yesterday in MM/DD/YYYY?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
[INCORRECT] Birthday shifts randomly in leap logic. [CORRECT] 02/28/2001 → 02/28/2017, so yesterday = 02/27/2017. The answer is 02/27/2017.<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>user
Today is 05/17/2008. What is the date 14 days from now in MM/DD/YYYY?<end_of_turn>
<start_of_turn>model
